name: Ranger Rob
overview: Adventurous Ranger Rob's favorite thing to do is go outside to play, explore and discover. That's easy for him to do at Big Sky Park, the coolest outdoor adventure park around. Along with his best friends, swinging sidekick Dakota and friendly yeti Stomper, the brave ranger zip lines, vine-swings and snowboards his way around the park to discover new places, from the desert to the frosted fields
